motProprio.title: Hi, I’m Nobert.
motProprio.body: I’ve been running this corner store in [city] for over twenty years. I’ve watched the kids of the neighborhood grow up, served three generations of customers, and I still know everyone’s favorite beer. My job is simple: have what you need, at a fair price, with a smile. No points program, no card to fill out — just a corner store owned by someone from the neighborhood, open when you need it. Drop by, take a moment to chat. That’s how we’ve done it from day one.

categoryIntros.biere: Quebec local beers, microbrews, imports and classics. Fridge kept ice cold.
categoryIntros.snacks: From chips to fine chocolate — the snack aisle the way it should be: generous and varied.
categoryIntros.boissons: Soft drinks, juice, water, energy drinks and fresh coffee around the clock.
categoryIntros.loto: Full Loto-Québec lineup: Lotto 6/49, Lotto Max, scratch tickets, La Quotidienne. Validation on-site.
categoryIntros.depannage: Milk, bread, eggs, canned goods, propane, matches — the essentials, no detour needed.
categoryIntros.glace: Bags of ice for coolers, parties and hot summer days.
